etl_logic: 'PUBLIC' UNION ALL 'PRIVATE' UNION ALL 'ESOP' UNION ALL 'DIVIDEND' UNION ALL 'OWNER_CAPITAL' UNION ALL 'OTHER'

description: Pivot qty dự kiến theo loại hình chào bán
etl_logic:
(pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_exst_shrhlr_ofrg_qty + pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_auctn_ofrg_qty + pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_pblc_othr_ofrg_qty + pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_pblc_co_ofrg_qty) -- PUBLIC
UNION ALL pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_prvt_plcmt_ofrg_qty -- PRIVATE
UNION ALL (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_esop_issn_qty + pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_bns_shr_issn_qty) -- ESOP
UNION ALL pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_dvdn_issn_qty -- DIVIDEND
UNION ALL pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_own_cptl_issn_qty -- OWNER_CAPITAL
UNION ALL (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_scr_qty - (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_exst_shrhlr_ofrg_qty + pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_auctn_ofrg_qty + pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_pblc_othr_ofrg_qty + pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_pblc_co_ofrg_qty + pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_prvt_plcmt_ofrg_qty + pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_esop_issn_qty + pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_bns_shr_issn_qty + pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_dvdn_issn_qty + pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_own_cptl_issn_qty)) -- OTHER

description: Pivot giá trị dự kiến (qty × price) theo loại hình
etl_logic:
(pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_exst_shrhlr_ofrg_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_exst_shrhlr_ofrg_prc) + (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_auctn_ofrg_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_auctn_ofrg_prc) + (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_pblc_othr_ofrg_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_pblc_othr_ofrg_prc) + (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_pblc_co_ofrg_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_pblc_co_ofrg_prc) -- PUBLIC
UNION ALL pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_prvt_plcmt_ofrg_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_prvt_plcmt_ofrg_prc -- PRIVATE
UNION ALL (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_esop_issn_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_esop_issn_prc) + (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_bns_shr_issn_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_bns_shr_issn_prc) -- ESOP
UNION ALL NULL -- DIVIDEND
UNION ALL NULL -- OWNER_CAPITAL
UNION ALL pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_procd_amt - ((pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_exst_shrhlr_ofrg_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_exst_shrhlr_ofrg_prc) + (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_auctn_ofrg_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_auctn_ofrg_prc) + (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_pblc_othr_ofrg_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_pblc_othr_ofrg_prc) + (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_pblc_co_ofrg_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_pblc_co_ofrg_prc) + (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_prvt_plcmt_ofrg_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_prvt_plcmt_ofrg_prc) + (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_esop_issn_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_esop_issn_prc) + (pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_bns_shr_issn_qty * pblc_co_scr_ofrg.pln_bns_shr_issn_prc)) -- OTHER
